title: Line Tracking
description: Building on our mobile robot, we added a triple IR sensor array mounted beneath the chassis to detect a black line on a light surface. The core challenge was developing an algorithm to keep the robot moving in a straight line despite the sensors' narrow field of view. We then extended the logic to count line intersections, triggering pre-programmed turns and strafing manoeuvres at specific counts to complete a defined navigation sequence autonomously.
